seo.title: Personalized Baby Celebration Products | My Baby Pictures Shop
seo.description: Shop personalized milestone frames, cupcake toppers and face garlands for baby birthdays and family celebrations from My Baby Pictures.

hero.title: Little party details made from your baby's happiest pictures.
hero.copy: Turn favorite baby photos into handcrafted frames, cupcake toppers and garlands for birthdays, milestones and family celebrations.

why: Made to order from your uploaded photos
Designed for birthdays, milestones and family functions
Safe packaging and friendly delivery coordination

faqs.q: Can I upload photos after choosing the product?
faqs.a: Yes. Each product checkout has a dedicated upload step with preview thumbnails before payment.

faqs.q: Can cupcake toppers use more than one face?
faqs.a: Yes. One face across all toppers is the default, but multiple faces and multiple images are supported.
This first version includes a placeholder Cashfree handoff. The code is structured so live Cashfree order creation can be wired later.

products.name: Milestone Frame
products.summary: A personalized keepsake frame for monthly milestones, birthdays and first-year memories.
products.shortDescription: Frame your baby's milestone moments with photos, name and age details.

gallery.alt: Baby milestone portrait for frame product
Family detail portrait for keepsake frame

upload.guidance: Upload clear, bright photos. For collage frames, include one favorite hero image first.

details: Designed with your baby's name, age or milestone text
howItWorks: Choose size, photo count and frame style
Preview the order summary before payment
Our team prepares the design and confirms details on WhatsApp if needed

reviews.name: Ritika M.
reviews.quote: The milestone frame became the sweetest corner of our birthday decor. It felt personal and premium.

reviews.name: Neha A.
reviews.quote: Uploading photos was simple, and the team helped us choose the best image for print.

faqs.q: Can I use older phone photos?
faqs.a: Yes, but clear, bright photos print best. Avoid screenshots or heavily cropped WhatsApp forwards.

faqs.q: Will I see the final design?
faqs.a: This first version shows an order preview. The team can confirm print-sensitive details on WhatsApp.

products.name: Cupcake Toppers
products.summary: Cute personalized toppers with your baby's face, name or age for birthday cupcakes and dessert tables.
products.shortDescription: Add baby-face toppers to cupcakes, desserts and party favors.

gallery.alt: Cake smash birthday photo for cupcake topper product

upload.guidance: One clear front-facing photo is perfect. Upload multiple photos if you want different faces across the pack.

details: Printed and cut for cupcake or dessert display
Supports one face by default or multiple faces
howItWorks: Choose pack size and topper style
Upload one or more face photos
Pay through the placeholder Cashfree flow

reviews.name: Priya S.
reviews.quote: The toppers made the dessert table instantly cute. Everyone asked where we got them made.

reviews.name: Megha K.
reviews.quote: I uploaded two faces and the pack came out adorable for our twins' birthday.

faqs.a: Yes. Choose the multiple faces option and upload all photos during checkout.
A bright, front-facing face photo with minimal blur works best for cutouts.

products.name: Face Garland
products.summary: A playful garland made with baby face cutouts, colors and party text for birthday backdrops.
products.shortDescription: Personalize your celebration wall with baby-face garlands.

gallery.alt: Birthday themed baby portrait for garland product
Creative family portrait for party keepsake
Festival baby portrait for themed garland

upload.guidance: Upload one favorite face for a repeating garland, or multiple expressions for a playful look.

details: Baby face cutouts arranged on a party garland
Easy to hang for photo backdrops
howItWorks: Choose face count, string length and theme
Upload one or more face photos
Review the preview and address details
Complete payment and receive next-step updates

reviews.name: Aarushi G.
reviews.quote: The face garland made our home party feel custom and so happy.

reviews.name: Simran P.
reviews.quote: It was easy to order and looked lovely behind the cake table.

faqs.q: Can I repeat one face across the garland?
faqs.a: Yes. Upload one photo and choose the face count you want.

faqs.q: Can the theme match our decor?
faqs.a: Choose the closest theme now and add color notes during checkout.
